address_type.text: ประเภทที่อยู่

combo.address_type: 0=ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน/1=ที่อยู่ตามทะเบียนบ้าน

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( select (CASE lag(sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no ) WHEN sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_edit_address.entry_id, sc_mem_edit_address.operate_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_address_no, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_postcode, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban, sc_mem_edit_address.address_no, sc_mem_edit_address.moo, sc_mem_edit_address.road, sc_mem_edit_address.soi, sc_mem_edit_address.tambol, sc_mem_edit_address.district_code, sc_mem_edit_address.province_code, sc_mem_edit_address.postcode, sc_mem_edit_address.telephone, sc_mem_edit_address.mooban, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code) as name_province, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.district_code) as name_district
from sc_mem_edit_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*WHERE*/ )tab
